justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly interpreted all of the user's date and time preferences throughout the conversation.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent consistently offered to check the following week or switch to a phone consultation, but did not offer a wider range of alternative dates or times within the same turn.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The conversation involved many turns where the agent repeatedly reported no availability for online meetings and offered the same two alternatives, making the interaction feel drawn out.
justifications.customer_experience: The repeated apologies and the continuous cycle of checking one week at a time for online availability, only to report no slots, created a frustrating and unproductive customer experience.

judge_scores.overall_notes: The agent successfully understood all user requests for dates and meeting types, but its inability to find any available slots for online pension consultations, coupled with its repetitive recovery strategy, led to a very inefficient and frustrating interaction for the user.
